title: Multi-identity ACR auth failure on Azure Pipelines
description: Reproduces a real support case: a Docker task using a Managed Service Identity ACR service connection fails on every run when two or more user-assigned managed identities are attached to the build agent. Deploys a self-hosted agent, two identities, and an ACR so engineers can reproduce the failure and demonstrate the fix.
author: Aman Srivastava
